name: Premium Adult Dog Food
description: High-protein salmon and rice kibble, ideal for skin and coat care in medium breed dogs.

name: Premium Clumping Cat Litter
description: Bentonite clay litter with maximum clumping action and odor control powered by activated carbon. Dust-free.

name: Natural Rubber Chew Toy
description: Ultra-durable toy designed for heavy chewers. Helps clean teeth and reduces separation anxiety.

name: Modular Cat Scratching Tree
description: Three-level activity tower featuring natural sisal-covered posts and a comfortable padded perch at the top.

name: Dehydrated Beef Liver Snacks
description: 100% natural single-ingredient training treats for dogs. No artificial preservatives or colorants.

name: Gourmet Tuna Fillets in Gravy Wet Food
description: Premium canned wet food for adult cats. High hydration and exceptional palatability for picky eaters.

name: Ergonomic No-Pull Dog Harness
description: Adjustable harness with reflective straps and dual-leash attachments for secure walks. Breathable mesh fabric.

name: Creamy Puree Cat Treat Tube
description: Lickable chicken and catnip flavored puree treat. Perfect for interactive feeding or as a kibble topper.

name: Hypoallergenic Oatmeal Dog Shampoo
description: Gentle formula with natural oatmeal extract, specially crafted for dogs with sensitive skin or allergies. Paraben-free.

name: Automatic Filtered Pet Water Fountain
description: 2-liter automatic water fountain with continuous flow and a triple-action purification filter. Encourages cats to drink more.
